summary.query_summary: This query generates a detailed report on patient referrals and their associated appointments over the past two years. It includes patient demographics, referral details, appointment outcomes, and risk assessments. Key metrics include appointment lead times, visit durations, no-show counts, and conversion and completion rates for specialties.
summary.primary_purpose: To analyze referral and appointment patterns, outcomes, and patient risk factors over the last two years.

columns.english_definition: Unique identifier for referrals that have either a first appointment sequence or no sequence, at least 10 distinct referrals, an entry date within the last two years, and a non-null referral status.

The patient ID from the REFERRAL table for patients with at least 10 distinct referrals, where the first appointment sequence is 1 or null, the referral entry date is within the last 2 years, and the referral status is not null.
The patient's full name as recorded in the patient demographic and registration information.
The number of years between the patient's birth date and the current date.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END /* Age-based risk category */

transformation_chain.name: age_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END /* Age-based risk category */ AS age_category

columns.english_definition: Categorizes age as 'Pediatric' if under 18, 'Young Adult' if between 18 and 40, 'Middle Age' if between 41 and 65, and 'Senior' if over 65, based on the difference in years between birth date and current date.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL) /* Count of active problems (subquery) */

transformation_chain.name: active_problem_count
transformation_chain.expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL) /* Count of active problems (subquery) */ AS active_problem_count

columns.english_definition: Counts the number of problems for a patient that have no resolved date.
The date the referral was created, filtered for referrals with at least 10 distinct IDs, the first or no appointment sequence, created in the last 2 years, and with a non-null status.
The name of the referral status from the ZC_RFL_STATUS table.
The specialty name from the ZC_SPECIALTY table.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE r.RFL_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Internal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Incoming' WHEN 3 THEN 'Outgoing' ELSE 'Unknown' END

transformation_chain.name: referral_class
transformation_chain.expression: CASE r.RFL_CLASS_C WHEN 1 THEN 'Internal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Incoming' WHEN 3 THEN 'Outgoing' ELSE 'Unknown' END AS referral_class

columns.english_definition: Categorizes referrals as 'Internal' for value 1, 'Incoming' for value 2, 'Outgoing' for value 3, and 'Unknown' for any other value.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END

transformation_chain.name: referral_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END AS referral_category

columns.english_definition: Assigns 'Active' if status is 1 or 2, 'Closed-Negative' if status is 4 or 5, 'Closed-Complete' if status is 6, otherwise 'Pending'.
Scheduled appointment identifier for the first appointment in a referral sequence, with at least 10 distinct referrals, scheduled within the last 2 years.
The date and time of the first appointment for a referral, occurring in the last two years, where the referral has at least 10 distinct referral IDs.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END /* Appointment outcome classification */

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END /* Appointment outcome classification */ AS appt_outcome

columns.english_definition: Classifies the appointment status as 'Completed' if status code is 2, 'Cancelled' if 3, 'No Show' if 4, 'Left Without Seen' if 5, 'Arrived' if 6, otherwise 'Scheduled'.
The name of the department from the CLARITY_DEP table.
Provider's full name from the provider master file.
Number of days between the referral date and the appointment date.
Number of days between when the appointment was scheduled and the appointment date.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN NOT fa.CHECKIN_DTTM IS NULL AND NOT fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM IS NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, fa.CHECKIN_DTTM, CHECKOUT_DTTM) ELSE NULL END /* Wait time in minutes (check-in to checkout) */

transformation_chain.name: visit_duration_minutes
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN NOT fa.CHECKIN_DTTM IS NULL AND NOT fa.CHECKOUT_DTTM IS NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, fa.CHECKIN_DTTM, CHECKOUT_DTTM) ELSE NULL END /* Wait time in minutes (check-in to checkout) */ AS visit_duration_minutes

columns.english_definition: Calculates the difference in minutes between the check-in and check-out times if both are available; otherwise, returns NULL.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows

columns.english_definition: The cumulative count of a patient's past appointments with a status code of 4, ordered by appointment date and time.

Average number of days between the referral date and the first appointment date, calculated for referrals created in the last two years where the referral status is not null and there are at least 10 distinct referrals.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: COALESCE(DATEDIFF(DAY, br.referral_date, APPT_DTTM), 0) - COALESCE(AVG(CAST(days_to_appointment AS FLOAT)), 0)

columns.english_definition: Difference between the days from referral date to appointment date and the average days to appointment, defaulting to 0 if either is null.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REFERRAL_ID), 0) * 100

transformation_chain.name: conversion_rate_pct
transformation_chain.expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT REFERRAL_ID), 0) * 100 AS conversion_rate_pct

columns.english_definition: Percentage of unique referrals with a non-null appointment ID divided by total unique referrals, multiplied by 100, for referrals with at least 10 distinct IDs and specific conditions on appointment sequence and dates.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END), 0) * 100

transformation_chain.name: completion_rate_pct
transformation_chain.expression: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN REFERRAL_ID END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL THEN REFERRAL_ID END), 0) * 100 AS completion_rate_pct

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END /* Appointment outcome classification */ AS appt_outcome

columns.english_definition: Percentage of distinct referrals with a completed appointment outcome, divided by the total distinct referrals with a non-null appointment identifier, multiplied by 100.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 3 THEN 'High Risk - Multiple No Shows' WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 1 AND ra.age_category = 'Senior' THEN 'Medium Risk - Senior with No Show History' WHEN ra.active_problem_count >= 5 THEN 'Medium Risk - Complex Patient' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, br.referral_date, APPT_DTTM) > AVG(CAST(days_to_appointment AS FLOAT)) * 2 THEN 'Medium Risk - Long Wait Time' ELSE 'Standard' END /* Risk flags */

transformation_chain.name: patient_risk_flag
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 3 THEN 'High Risk - Multiple No Shows' WHEN ra.cumulative_no_shows >= 1 AND ra.age_category = 'Senior' THEN 'Medium Risk - Senior with No Show History' WHEN ra.active_problem_count >= 5 THEN 'Medium Risk - Complex Patient' WHEN ra.days_to_appointment > sm.avg_days_to_first_appt * 2 THEN 'Medium Risk - Long Wait Time' ELSE 'Standard' END /* Risk flags */ AS patient_risk_flag

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows

transformation_chain.name: active_problem_count
transformation_chain.expression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROBLEM_LIST AS pl WHERE pl.PAT_ID = p.PAT_ID AND pl.RESOLVED_DATE IS NULL) /* Count of active problems (subquery) */ AS active_problem_count

transformation_chain.name: cumulative_no_shows
transformation_chain.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN fa.APPT_STATUS_C = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY fa.PAT_ID ORDER BY fa.APPT_DTTM ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_no_shows

transformation_chain.name: age_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 18 AND 40 THEN 'Young Adult' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.BIRTH_DATE, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 41 AND 65 THEN 'Middle Age' ELSE 'Senior' END /* Age-based risk category */ AS age_category

columns.english_definition: Assigns 'High Risk - Multiple No Shows' if cumulative no-shows are 3 or more; 'Medium Risk - Senior with No Show History' if cumulative no-shows are 1 or more and age category is 'Senior'; 'Medium Risk - Complex Patient' if active problem count is 5 or more; 'Medium Risk - Long Wait Time' if days between referral date and appointment date exceed twice the average days to appointment; otherwise, assigns 'Standard'.

technical_definition.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN ra.appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN 1 WHEN ra.appt_outcome IN ('Cancelled', 'No Show') THEN 0 WHEN ra.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL AND ra.referral_category = 'Active' THEN NULL /* Still pending */ ELSE 0 END /* Referral success indicator */

transformation_chain.name: referral_success_flag
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN ra.appt_outcome = 'Completed' THEN 1 WHEN ra.appt_outcome IN ('Cancelled', 'No Show') THEN 0 WHEN ra.PAT_ENC_CSN_ID IS NULL AND ra.referral_category = 'Active' THEN NULL /* Still pending */ ELSE 0 END /* Referral success indicator */ AS referral_success_flag

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END /* Appointment outcome classification */ AS appt_outcome

transformation_chain.name: appt_outcome
transformation_chain.expression: CASE fa.APPT_STATUS_C WHEN 2 THEN 'Completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'Cancelled' WHEN 4 THEN 'No Show' WHEN 5 THEN 'Left Without Seen' WHEN 6 THEN 'Arrived' ELSE 'Scheduled' END /* Appointment outcome classification */ AS appt_outcome

transformation_chain.name: referral_category
transformation_chain.expression: CASE WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (1, 2) THEN 'Active' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C IN (4, 5) THEN 'Closed-Negative' WHEN r.REFERRAL_STATUS_C = 6 THEN 'Closed-Complete' ELSE 'Pending' END AS referral_category

columns.english_definition: 1 if the appointment outcome is 'Completed', 0 if 'Cancelled' or 'No Show', NULL if no appointment ID and referral category is 'Active', otherwise 0.
